impact: This advances the PP&D fixture-first extraction plan by giving the solar workflow a deterministic, source-backed expected output with the seven required requirement categories before any live crawl or authenticated DevHub automation.
summary: Add a minimal redacted solar permit requirement extraction expected-output fixture and narrow validation test.
target_task: Task checkbox-77: Add a minimal solar permit requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly seven category records: eligibility, plan-review applicability, upload requirements, fee/payment checkpoints, corrections, inspections, and explicit-confirmation gates, all source-backed and redacted.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
